title: Court case opposing Leonardo to Italian NGOs over contracts with Israel opens
summary_full: “Citizens have the right to know whether weapons are being shipped from Italy to massacre civilians in Palestine,"a Socialist Italian MEP told Euractiv as the trial opens in Rome.
summary_public: “Citizens have the right to know whether weapons are being shipped from Italy to massacre civilians in Palestine,"a Socialist Italian MEP told Euractiv as the trial opens in Rome.
